title: Counting Words With a Given Prefix
titleCn: 统计包含给定前缀的字符串

testcases.input: words = ["pay","attention","practice","attend"], pref = "at" Output: 2 Explanation: The 2 strings that contain "at" as a prefix are: "attention" and "attend".
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The 2 strings that contain "at" as a prefix are: "attention" and "attend".

testcases.input: words = ["leetcode","win","loops","success"], pref = "code" Output: 0 Explanation: There are no strings that contain "code" as a prefix.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: There are no strings that contain "code" as a prefix.
